inspectorv2.filter.packagefilter.Archite.Description: An object that contains details on the package architecture type to filter on.

inspectorv2.filter.packagefilter.Epoch.Description: An object that contains details on the package epoch to filter on.

inspectorv2.filter.packagefilter.Name.Description: An object that contains details on the name of the package to filter on.

inspectorv2.filter.packagefilter.Release.Description: An object that contains details on the package release to filter on.

inspectorv2.filter.packagefilter.SourceL.Description: An object that contains details on the source layer hash to filter on.

inspectorv2.filter.packagefilter.Version.Description: The package version to filter on.
